setup.title: Setup

tableSetup.shuffleFortuneTellerDeck: Shuffle the fortune teller deck face down in a pile.
tableSetup.flameMarkerPlacement: Place the flame marker on space 1 of the round track.
tableSetup.chooseIngredientBooks: Choose a set of ingredient books (numbered 1-4 by bookmark count). Pick one orange (pumpkin) book and one black (moth) book. Flip each to the side matching your player count (shown by cauldron icons in the bottom-left corner).
tableSetup.sortIngredientTokens: Sort ingredient tokens into piles by value: 1s, 2s, and 3+. Colors will be mixed within piles — this is intentional.

perPlayerSetup.oneCauldronBoard: 1 cauldron board — book side up (not test tubes)
perPlayerSetup.oneScoringMarker: 1 scoring marker (matching color) → place next to space 1 on the scoring track
perPlayerSetup.onePlayerMarker: 1 player marker → place on space 0 (zero side up)
perPlayerSetup.oneRuby: 1 ruby → place to the left of your cauldron
perPlayerSetup.oneFlask: 1 flask → place full-side up on the silver tray
perPlayerSetup.oneDropletMarker: 1 droplet marker → place on the first center space of your cauldron
perPlayerSetup.oneRatMarker: 1 rat marker → place in the bowl

setup.scoringNote: Scoring note: If a player crosses 50 points, flip the scoring marker to its "50" side and continue from the beginning of the track.

stepTwo.title: Draw a Fortune
stepTwo.drawFortuneTellerCard: The starting player draws from the fortune teller deck.
stepTwo.purpleCards: Purple cards — resolve immediately, then discard.
stepTwo.blueCards: Blue cards — remain in effect until end of round; keep visible.
stepTwo.note: Note: If a card references yellow mandrakes or purple ghosts and those aren't in the game yet, ignore that part.

stepThree.title: Draw Ingredients (Simultaneous)
stepThree.drawTokens: All players draw tokens one at a time from their bags and place them in their cauldrons.

placement.title: Placement
placement.tokenAdvancement: Each token advances you forward by its printed value, measured from your last placed token (or your starting position for the first draw).

stopping.title: Stopping
stopping.voluntaryStop: You may stop voluntarily at any time. If you reach the last cauldron space, place the token there and stop.

exploding.title: Exploding
exploding.exploded: If the total value of all white bloomberries in your cauldron exceeds 7, you explode!Place the token that caused it, then stop immediately.

rules.title: Rules
rules.doNotLookInBag: You may never look inside your bag.
rules.flaskUsage: Flask: After drawing a bloomberry that does notcause you to explode, you may return it to your bag and flip your flask to its empty side. You cannot use the flask on a token that would cause an explosion.

bonusDie.description: The player who reached the farthest final space without exploding rolls the bonus die. Ties: all tied players roll.
bonusDie.finalSpaceNote: Your "final space" is the space immediately after your last placed token.

ingredientEffects.description: Resolve Green → Purple → Black effects now.

bonusRubies.description: If your final space shows a ruby icon, take 1 ruby.

scoring.vpNote: Victory points earned = the number shown in the small square on your final space.

shopping.description: Starting player goes first, then clockwise. Spend the money value shown on your final space.
shopping.buyTokens: Buy 1 or 2 tokens — if 2, they must be different colors.
shopping.costsListed: Costs are listed on the ingredient books.
shopping.limitedSupply: Token supply is limited — once gone, they're gone!
shopping.availability: Availability: Yellow mandrakes from Round 2 · Purple ghosts from Round 3
shopping.returnTokens: After shopping, return all cauldron tokens + new purchases to your bag.

spendRubies.description: Spend 2 rubies per action, as many times as you can afford:

rats.step1: Place your rat marker on your droplet.
rats.step2: Count the rat tails on the scoreboard between you and the leader.
rats.step3: Advance your rat marker that many spaces — this is your starting position next round.
rats.note: Note: The rat marker resets each round. If you're closer to the leader next round, it moves back. If further away, it moves even further forward. The rats never help the lead player. Skip this step in the final round.

nextRound.moveFlame: Move the flame marker forward one space.
nextRound.passDeck: Pass the fortune deck clockwise to the new starting player.
nextRound.tokensInBag: All tokens should be back in your bag.
nextRound.round6Special: Round 6 special: Every player adds 1 extra White 1 Bloomberry to their bag.

noShopping.description: Instead, convert resources to victory points:

tiebreaker.farthestSpace: Farthest final space in the last round.
